hero.title: Study - Internships - Travel - Language Camps
hero.subtitle: Discover international programs, internships, language camps, and cultural experiences that help young people learn, grow, and broaden their horizons.
hero.backgroundAlt: Students experiencing international study and cultural exchange

whoWeAre.title: At Stuventaa, we guide students on their educational journey
whoWeAre.description: We support students who aspire to study in Germany with personalized guidance on applications, language programs, and preparatory courses—offering clear orientation, transparent steps, and reliable support throughout the process.
features: Cultural and educational travel programs with a clear structure
Language learning and dedicated internship & orientation guidance
Support for local and international opportunities—tailored to your profile
whoWeAre.footerText: Our goal is to create meaningful experiences that combine education, cultural exchange, and practical exposure. Through our programs, students broaden their perspectives and prepare for their academic and professional future.
whoWeAre.highlight: Education, cultural experience, and personal growth — all in one place.

items.title: Study & Explore
items.description: Experience Germany’s high academic standards, strengthen your skills, and gain real insights into learning within an authentic university environment.

items.title: Internship Opportunities
items.description: We support your career start with hands-on experience, suitable internship options, and professional guidance throughout the application process.

items.title: Travel Adventures
items.description: Broaden your horizons through cultural exchange, new perspectives, and unforgettable experiences—bringing learning and discovery together.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | STUVENTAA
seo.description: Privacy Policy of STUVENTAA in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

header.title: Privacy Policy
header.intro: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This privacy policy explains how we collect, process, and protect your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

scope.title: 2. Scope of This Privacy Policy
scope.text: This privacy policy applies to the website operated by STUVENTAA and all services offered through this website.

processing.title: 3. Personal Data Processing
processing.text: We process personal data only when you voluntarily contact us via:
processing.note: The processed data may include your email address, phone number, and the content of your inquiry.

legalBasis.title: 5. Legal Basis
legalBasis.text: Personal data is processed on the following legal bases:
items: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR – processing necessary for pre-contractual measures or contractual communication
Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR – legitimate interest in responding to inquiries and maintaining communication

storage.title: 6. Data Storage and Deletion
storage.text: Personal data is stored only for as long as necessary to process your request or as required by legal retention obligations. After that, the data is deleted.

sharing.title: 7. Data Sharing
sharing.text: Your personal data will not be shared with third parties unless required by law.

hosting.title: 8. Hosting and Server Logs
hosting.text: When accessing this website, technical data (such as IP address, date and time of access, browser type, and operating system) may be processed by the hosting provider for security and technical reasons. This processing is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.

cookies.title: 9. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.text: This website does not use cookies for tracking, analytics, or marketing purposes.

rights.title: 10. Your Rights
rights.text: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, or restrict the processing of your personal data, as well as the right to data portability and to object to processing (Art. 15–21 GDPR).
rights.contact: To exercise your rights, please contact us via email.

complaint.title: 11. Right to Lodge a Complaint
complaint.text: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority if you believe that the processing of your personal data violates the GDPR.
